root.name: Add a new slide after slide 6 with the title 'Summary of Accounting Terms'
root.description: Evaluates whether a new slide is added in the correct position (after slide 6) and titled 'Summary of Accounting Terms', without extraneous changes to other slides.

children.name: A new slide is added
children.description: Checks that exactly one slide was added to the presentation.

children.name: Added slide is after slide 6
children.description: Checks that the new slide is inserted immediately after slide 6 (i.e., as slide 7 in modified presentation).

children.name: Added slide's title is 'Summary of Accounting Terms'
children.description: Checks that the newly added slide's title is exactly 'Summary of Accounting Terms'.

children.name: No extraneous changes to other slides
children.description: Checks that no slides (except the new one) were added, removed, or modified.

metadata.task: Add a new slide after slide 6 with the title 'Summary of Accounting Terms'
